# kDNSServiceFlagsIndeterminate | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ dnssd ](/documentation/dnssd)

- [ kDNSServiceFlagsIndeterminate ](/documentation/dnssd/kDNSServiceFlagsIndeterminate)

-  kDNSServiceFlagsIndeterminate 

Global Variable# kDNSServiceFlagsIndeterminate

iOS 10.0+iPadOS 10.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.12+tvOS 10.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 3.0+

```
var kDNSServiceFlagsIndeterminate: UInt32 { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/dnssd/kDNSServiceFlagsIndeterminate#Discussion)

There is no valid trust anchor that can be used to determine whether a response is secure or not.
